overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a traditional Japanese village in spring. The character travels along dirt paths past wooden houses with thatched roofs, stone walls, and cherry blossoms, transitioning from a village settlement into a surrounding pine forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: village approach path with stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a large traditional residence

entered.detail: large wooden structure with thatched roof and curved eaves
low stacked stone wall running alongside the path
unpaved village trail with patches of grass
tall evergreen trees forming the village backdrop
simple wooden post fence marking field boundaries

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a village dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the right and wooden fences on the left. A large traditional house with a thatched roof is visible ahead, surrounded by tall pine trees under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional residence garden with vegetable plots

events.description: passing the entrance of the main traditional house into the garden area

agents.ego_description: walking past the main residence and through the garden area

entered.detail: rows of cultivated plants and vegetables growing in the garden
tree with white and pink blossoms indicating spring season
smaller wooden outbuilding with thatched roof

segments.scene_description: The character passes the main traditional house, moving from the front approach into a garden area with vegetable plots. A cherry blossom tree blooms on the right as the stone wall falls behind, and a smaller hut comes into view ahead.

events.description: slight turn toward the stone stairs visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating between village outbuildings and garden areas

entered.detail: stone steps leading upward toward the forested area
wooden storage barrel beside the path

segments.scene_description: Moving through a secondary village area with smaller huts and outbuildings, the character walks through tall grass past wooden barrels and fences. Stone stairs become visible in the distance, marking the transition point toward the forest.

events.description: beginning ascent of the stone stairs
reaching the top of stairs and entering the forested area

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs leading up from the village to the forest

entered.detail: thick forest of tall pine trees marking the wilderness boundary

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a flight of stone stairs leaving the village behind, transitioning from cultivated grounds into a dense pine forest. The lighting becomes slightly dappled as the tree canopy increases overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding forest path away from the village

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense forest vegetation
village buildings visible in the distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: Now deep in the forest, the character follows a winding dirt path surrounded by tall pine trees and dense undergrowth. The village is visible only as distant rooftops through the trees as the trail continues into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a samurai as he travels from a structured village settlement into the depths of a wild pine forest. It begins on a dirt path bordered by stone walls and wooden fences, moving toward a large thatched-roof house under a clear blue sky. As the character passes the main residence, the scene shifts into a garden area with vegetable plots and blooming cherry blossoms before expanding into a secondary village zone filled with smaller huts, wooden barrels, and tall grass. The camera then follows the samurai as he ascends a flight of stone stairs, leaving the cultivated grounds behind and entering a dense pine forest where the lighting becomes dappled under a thick canopy. Finally, the path winds deeper into the wilderness through heavy undergrowth, with the village rooftops fading into the distance behind the towering trees.
